title: Sharper Netherite
description: Netherite, as the most powerful tier deserves a better texture!
body:
Retextures the old, boring textures of the powerful netherite tool set! Vanilla style. 

This resource pack includes:
Pickaxe, Sword, Hoe, Shovel, Axe and Spear textures for the netherite versions.
Netherite Knive from Farmer's Delight also included.
More mod/resource pack compat will probably coming. If you want a specific crossover, write in the comments. You can do anything with this pack, as long as you tell me. 
This should be compatible with all versions of 1.16 and above. If something doesn't work or I forgot to update this to new versions, please tell me.

_Note that we do not take responsibility for eyes, that burned and/or exploded because of the beautiful new textures. Use at your own risk. This is a resource pack and does not actually make netherite tools deal more damage._
